placements.overview:
Faculty of Allied Health Science, MAHER is an institute located in Kanchipuram, Tamil Nadu. Faculty of Allied Health Science, MAHER courses are offered to students at the UG levels. The institute offers courses in Full Time mode. Faculty of Allied Health Science, MAHER offers a total of 9 courses in stream such as Medicine & Health Sciences. Some of the popular course offered at the institute is B.Sc. and the total seat intake for the available courses is 65. This course is offered to students across several specialisations such as Anaesthesia Technology, Cardiovascular Technology, Dialysis Technology, Medical Laboratory Technology and Optometry. Further, the fee for all these courses ranges between INR 3,67,000 to 4,08,000 and the average median salary is around INR 4,00,000. Apart from this, the Faculty of Allied Health Science, MAHER campus has a state-of-the-art infrastructure with all the advanced facilities.

Faculty of Allied Health Science, MAHER offers a wide range of programmes to students at the UG level. The college is mainly concerned with stream such as Medicine & Health Sciences. At the UG level, the college offers courses such as B.Sc. Faculty of Allied Health Science, MAHER courses are offered to students in Full Time mode. Further, the fees structure for Faculty of Allied Health Science, MAHER courses stands around INR 3,67,000 to 4,08,000.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Perfusion Technology - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: This college is good for work-driven student.

review_content.Placements: Around 80% of students get placed each year. The highest salary package offered is 4.2 LPA. The lowest salary package offered is 2 LPA. The top recruiting companies are Apollo Hospitals, Max, and Meenakshi itself hires the students. Almost 95% of students get internships in Maher, and students are not paid during this. Students can join as junior perfusionists after completing this course, then as per their experience, they will be promoted.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is average. There is no facility for Wi-Fi. But laboratories are well-equipped and maintained. The classroom and library are also up to the mark. There is a wide collection of books including foreign journals. The hostel facility is average. There are 3 students in a room with an attached washroom. The room size is decent. The quality of food is not good but adjustable. As I am from north India so it's very tough for students to consume regularly. Sports and games like cricket, volleyball, khokho, kabaddi, and football are played. The medical facility is also available 24X7.

highlights.summary:
The NEET MDS 2026 application process has commenced for Bharati Vidyapeeth Dental College and Hospital admission to the MDS course, with Mar 30, 2026, being the last date to register. Also, the NEET MDS exam 2026 is going to be held on May 2, 2026.

table.details: Bharati Vidyapeeth Dental College and Hospital

college_info.intro:
Bharati Vidyapeeth Dental College Sangli offers BDS and MDS as its popular programmes. The College offers it based on the eligibility of merit and entrance. Candidates applying for the either must have completed 17 years of age. For admission to BDS, the General category (UR) candidates must qualify NEET with a minimum of 50 percentile and qualify as per the DCI norms. However, for the Backward classes (SC/ST), a minimum of 40 percentile is necessary to be secured in NEET. Additionally, for MDS, candidates must have passed the BDS examination from any Dental College recognised by the Dental Council of India. The College offers these courses for a fee ranging between INR 15.8 Lakh to INR 40.95 Lakh.
For more information about Dental College and Hospital, Sangli, Bharati Vidyapeeth check out the below video:

fees_and_eligibility.overview:
The College offers seven courses. The duration of BDS and MDS is five and three years, respectively. Candidates pursing BDS must also complete a one-year compulsory rotatory internship. The College offers MDS across six specialisations, including Prosthodontics, Oral and Maxillofacial Surgery, Orthodontics and Dentofacial Orthopaedics, Conservative Dentistry and Endodontics, Pedodontics and Prevantive Dentistry, and Periodontics.

The seat intake for BDS is 100 and MDS is 18. Some Bharati Vidyapeeth Dental College and Hospital Sangli courses are mentioned below:

faqs.answer: A:    The NEET exam must be passed, state-level counselling must be attended, and the designated dental college's admissions procedures must be fulfilled as part of the BDS selection process in India. Although there is no minimum NEET score needed, a higher score improves your chances of being accepted into the college of your choice. Score thresholds change according on the state, competition level, and category. For SC/ST, OBC, and General categories, aim for scores over the 40th percentile,  45th, and 50th, respectively. For the most recent details on the selection process and cutoff scores, stay informed by consulting official sources.
faqs.question: What is the selection process for BDS and what is the minimum NEET score required?

faqs.answer: A:    Candidates need to pass BDS examination from any Dental College recognised by Dental Council of India to apply for Dental College and Hospital, Sangli, Bharati Vidyapeeth MDS programme. Candidates should possess a permanent registration with any State Dental Council in India or Dental Council of India. In case he does not have the same, he will be required to obtain such registration within one month after admission to the PG course. Besides, aspirants must be an Indian national to apply for MDS.
faqs.question: What is the eligibility for MDS at BVDC Sangli?

faqs.answer: A:    The total tuition fee for Dental College and Hospital, Sangli, Bharati Vidyapeeth MDS is INR 41 lakh. This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change. Candidates need to pay a course fee to confirm their seat in the college. The total fee of MDS includes components such as tuition fee, exam fee, caution deposit, etc.
faqs.question: How much is the MDS fee at BVDC Sangli?

faqs.answer: A:    Bharati Vidyapeeth Dental College and Hospital accepts NEET-UG score for admission to BDS programme. NEET is an offline exam conducted once a year  for three hours and 20 minutes or 200 minutes. As far as the NEET exam pattern is concerned, there are 200 questions from Physics, Chemistry and Biology, out of which 180 questions need to be attempted. Aspirants with rank equal or above the NEET cutoff are offered seat in the BDS programme.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Dental Surgery (BDS) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Our college has good infrastructure and college is also good.

review_content.Placements: It depends on what time you open your clinic or if you want to do an MS(Master of Science) All the students have to compulsory do the internship from the college itself in the last year. The top roles offered in our course can be specialists in each subject There are nine subjects.
review_content.Infrastructure: While college is equipped with excellent facilities and has a wonderful infrastructure, proper lecture halls and a library with all needed books The hostel facility is nice including food and canteen, the big ground is present for sports and games inside the campus.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Dental Surgery (BDS) - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: The college has the good course and quality of education.

review_content.Placements: We have a compulsory internship for one year in our hospital. After that, we are on our own. Some joined the clinics of our faculty, and the others are doing the research or studying to get the MS admission. MS students work on patients all day in the college and then go to the various clinics to do those patients outside the college.
review_content.Infrastructure: The Wi-Fi facility, high-tech labs, A/C classrooms with the projectors, complete medical facility, massive ground for all outdoor sports and all indoor sports are there on the campus, which are good. Many of us opened own clinic either a full day or half day, or keep it open for certain days of the week. The others days we work at the college itself.

course_faqs.question: What are the top Scholarships for BDS at Bharati Vidyapeeth Dental College and Hospital- Sangli, Bharati Vidyapeeth and how to avail them?
course_faqs.answer: Students pursuing BDS from Bharati Vidyapeeth Dental College and Hospital can apply for scholarship offered by Indian Dental Association. IDA provides IDA-Colgate Merit Awards. Students wishing to get the scholarship should be an under graduate student of BDS and, more importantly, an IDA Member. They must be among the first three rank holders in the respective BDS academic years.

review_summary.college_name: Bharati Vidyapeeth Dental College and Hospital Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Dental Surgery (BDS) - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: I am not satisfied with BDS.

content.Placements: In this college, students can choose MS or they can opt for general practise. There were a lot of options after this course but I still prefer opening clinic instead of just doing masters and wasting time and money on it as the masters course has a lot of fees.
content.Infrastructure: This college provides the best infrastructure in the district. The hostels were good, and the library was good. It provides huge campus for walks in the evening. The hostel food was average in this college.
content.Faculty: The teaching staff was one of the best, but subjects related to dentistry were given in final year until then not much related to dentistry. There were 8 subjects in final year, and a lot of pressure was there for internships. The oral surgery department was helpful in practical related terms.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Dental Surgery (BDS) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Our college has good infrastructure and college is also good.

content.Placements: It depends on what time you open your clinic or if you want to do an MS(Master of Science) All the students have to compulsory do the internship from the college itself in the last year. The top roles offered in our course can be specialists in each subject There are nine subjects.
content.Infrastructure: While college is equipped with excellent facilities and has a wonderful infrastructure, proper lecture halls and a library with all needed books The hostel facility is nice including food and canteen, the big ground is present for sports and games inside the campus.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Dental Surgery (BDS) - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: The college has the good course and quality of education.

content.Placements: We have a compulsory internship for one year in our hospital. After that, we are on our own. Some joined the clinics of our faculty, and the others are doing the research or studying to get the MS admission. MS students work on patients all day in the college and then go to the various clinics to do those patients outside the college.
content.Infrastructure: The Wi-Fi facility, high-tech labs, A/C classrooms with the projectors, complete medical facility, massive ground for all outdoor sports and all indoor sports are there on the campus, which are good. Many of us opened own clinic either a full day or half day, or keep it open for certain days of the week. The others days we work at the college itself.

admission_overview.college_name: Bharati Vidyapeeth Dental College and Hospital Admission 2025: Eligibility, Fees & Selection Criteria

paragraphs: BVDC Sangli admissionsare entrance-based. The college offers admission to BDS and MDS courses based on NEET and NEET MDS scores, respectively.BVDC Sanglia constitutent unit ofBharatI VidyapeethDeemed-to-be-University. The college offers BDS and MDS courses approved by the Dental Council of India and MOHFW (Ministry of Health and Family Welfare). Interested candidates can apply online for the preferred course.

Candidates need to qualify entrance exam specific to their course for admission. The college accepts NEET and NEET MDS for respective courses. Below areBVDC Sangli coursesalong with their eligibility and selection criteria:
*In the absence of clarity on the official website, the information is taken from unofficial sources.
Download:BVDC Sangli Prospectus

The total fee of BVDC includes hotel fee, caution deposit, etc. Students need to pay the fee in the form of DD or cheque in favour of the college. In case the candidate withdraws admission during counselling period, he or she will not get refund. Below is course-wiseBVDC Sangli feeand average package:
Note:This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.
Candidates are offered seat in the college based on entrance exam score. The intake for MDS is distributed among various specialisations. Below is course-wise BVDC Sangli intake:
Note:This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

BVDC admission process includes registration, selection, merit list and counselling. Candidates need to apply for the entrance exam accepted for the preferred course. Below are the steps to get a seat in BVDC Sangli:
STEP 1: BVDC Application Process 2025

Candidates meeting the eligibility criteria need to apply for NEET for BDS admission. Aspirants have to fill out the NEET MDS application form for MDS course. Further, candidates may need to fill out the admission form on the college website.
STEP 2: Selection

BVDC selects candidates for BDS based on their NEET score. Candidates must also fulfil the eligibility criteria for admission. For MDS, the selection is based on NEET MDS score. Aspirants must secure at least 50% aggregate in the exam (40% for SC/ ST).
STEP 3: Counselling and Admission Confirmation

Aspirants need to participate in the institute-level counselling. Aspirants need to bring the specified documents for verification. Selected candidates need to pay the course fee to confirm their seat in the college.

placement_data.title: Bharati Vidyapeeth Dental College and Hospital Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: As per Bharati Vidyapeeth Dental College and Hospital NIRF report 2024, the median package offered during UG 5-year and PG 3-year placements 2023 stood at INR 1.42 LPA and INR 6.39 LPA , respectively. Earlier, the NIRF report 2023 is released. According to the report, 19 BDS and 17 MDS students were placed during BVDU Dental College and Hospital placements 2022. The median package offered to BDS and MDS students during the BVDU Dental College and Hospital placements 2022 was INR 1.25 LPA and INR 6.25 LPA , respectively.

faqs.question: How are BDS placements at Bharati Vidyapeeth Dental College and Hospital- Sangli, Bharati Vidyapeeth?
faqs.answer: Placements are average depending on individual capabilities and skills. The placement rate recorded during Bharati Vidyapeeth Dental College Sangli BDS placements 2021 was 77%. Earlier, the placement rate recorded during Bharati Vidyapeeth Dental College Sangli BDS placements in 2020 and 2019 was 84% and 79%, respectively.

faqs.question: Which branch is the best in BDS from Bharati Vidyapeeth Dental College and Hospital- Sangli, Bharati Vidyapeeth?
faqs.answer: The first-rate branch in BDS from Bharati Vidyapeeth Dental College and Hospital- Sangli, Bharati Vidyapeeth is the one that great suits your hobbies and profession goals. All of the branches offered by means of the college are nicely-regarded and offer notable education and opportunities for graduates. Here is a brief review of each department: General Dentistry: This is the most common branch of BDS and prepares college students for a trendy exercise profession in dentistry. Orthodontics: This department makes a speciality of the correction of crooked or misaligned tooth. Orthodontists use braces, retainers, and different appliances to straighten enamel and improve the patient's smile. Periodontology: This department focuses on the gums and supporting structures of the teeth. Periodontists diagnose and deal with gum disorder, which can result in tooth loss. Prosthodontics: This department specializes in the substitute of lacking enamel with artificial tooth. Prosthodontists can create crowns, bridges, dentures, and different dental appliances. Oral and Maxillofacial Surgery: This department focuses on the surgical remedy of the mouth, jaws, and face. Oral and maxillofacial surgeons can perform a huge range of processes, which includes extractions, implants, and facial reconstruction.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Paavai College of Pharamcy and Research.

content.Placements: 80-90% students are placed. The average package is 15000 Rupees, the highest package is 80000, and the lowest package is 10000. Top roles are drug inspector and medical representative.
content.Infrastructure: My college has a neat campus. The infrastructure is very good. The classrooms and library have several fans and the auditorium is air conditioned. My college has good facilities for health and sports like, football, volleyball and kabaddi etc. Hostel has clean rooms.
content.Faculty: The teachers are helpful both in academics and personal. The teaching quality is well improved. Curriculum is related to the industry. The pass percentage is 50% in the theory and practical.

individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with this college because of its good infrastructure.

content.Placements: Around 90% of students are placed. They offer in medical Apollo pharmacies. Around 50% of students get internships.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available only in the laboratory. Classrooms conditions are good. Library is also available in this college. The infrastructure is very good, but the playground is small. There is a mess and a canteen on campus. Medical facilities are provided, and an ambulance is also available for students.
content.Faculty: The teaching quality is good. Teachers are helpful, and their qualification is M. Pharma. Semester exams are difficult, and the pass percentage is 50%. Our course curriculum makes students industry-ready. Semester exams are easy, because they are conducted in our college. At least 90% of students pass the semester exam. This course is professional. Students obey the conditions put by this college.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: The college is very good.

content.Placements: Above 100 students chose the B.Pharmacy course.
content.Infrastructure: Sports are good. Food is average, and the hostel is much nicer on the pharmacy campus than on the engineering campus. The fees can differ from others. The canteens are open, and a lot of food can be bought, e.g., drinks, biscuits, puffs, etc. Sometimes we do not get food from the canteens that provide food.
content.Faculty: The teachers are well-educated, qualified, and skilled. Staff are working in the college, and the exams are to be conducted semester-wise. The passing percentage is 50% as the exams are conducted strictly by the external and principals.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Good teaching and laboratory facilities.

content.Placements: 80% of students are placed in pharmaceutical industries and are mostly placed in Apollo Pharmacies by attending the placement interviews. content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are very neat and kept clean always. The lab equipment is useful for formulating the pharmaceutical experiments. Library books are available and useful to study for semesters and to prepare our own notes. The canteen food is good, and the mess food is average.

college_info.intro: NIMS Institute of Management and Commerce offers 17+ courses across various streams. NIMS Institute of Management and Commerce is known for its flagship MBA, BBA, BCom, MA, BHMTT, BHMCT, PG Diploma and many other programmes. The course duration varies from 1 year to 5 years, depending on the course chosen by the candidate. NIMS Institute of Management and Commerce offers postgraduate courses such as MBA, BBA, BDes, BCom, MA, BHMTT, BHMCT, PG Diploma in the disciplines of Business Design, Human Resource Management, Analytics, Finance, Marketing, Finance, Human Resources, Analytics, Marketing and many more. NIMS Institute of Management and Commerce's highest package during NIMS Jaipur placements 2023 stood at INR 20 LPA. The top recruiters of NIMS University Jaipur placements in 2023 included Goldman Sachs, Dell, TCS and many more. Below mentioned are some of the courses offered by the NIMS Institute of Management and Commerce and their respective eligibility and fees:

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, if you do well on the NIMSEE exam and meet the other requirements for admission, you can get admissions to NIMS undergraduate programs even with a 70% score on the 12th board exam.A significant qualifying requirement for admission to NIMS's undergraduate programs, including BBA, BCA, B.Com, and BA (JMC), is a 12th percentage. A minimum of 50% of total points must be earned by general category students in their 12th grade exams from an accredited board.In 12th grade, the minimum pass percentage for reserved categories such as SC/ST is 45%.Students must take the NIMSEE entrance exam, which is administered by the NIMS Institute, in addition to their 12th grade results.Students are shortlisted for a subsequent admissions process based on their NIMSEE score and 12th percentile.

reviews_list.review_title: NIMS University is best fro MBA course.

review_content.Placements: Around 90% of students are placed. The highest salary package offered ranges from 15 LPA - 35 LPA and the lowest salary package offered ranges from 2 LPA- 9 LPA. Top companies are Google, Deloitte, Cognizant, and others. Marketing manager, financial manager, and other top positions are available.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our university infrastructure is first-rate. Its climate is healthy and natural. Students feel at ease in spacious classrooms. Each department has its library. Library has all of the top authors' reference books available. There are excellent labs with equipment available for medical students. There are 14 departments in all at NIMS.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: Overall, it's a fine college with all facilities.

review_content.Placements: 80 out of 100 students get placed. The highest salary is 16 LPA, the lowest is 5 LPA, and the average is 8 LPA. All management-related roles such as consulting, product management, sales and marketing, general management, and operations are considered (with salaries typically around 16 LPA). All students have done internships.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is quite good. The campus has its own playgrounds, auditorium, faculty building, and residential area, with a significant amount of greenery. Because of this greenery, one can often see peacocks and other animals and birds wandering throughout the campus.

overview_faqs.answer: NIMS University, located in Jaipur, Rajasthan, is a private university that offers various programs across multiple disciplines, including management and commerce. Here is some information about the management and commerce programs at NIMS University:Courses and Programs: NIMS University offers undergraduate, postgraduate, and doctoral programs in management and commerce. These programs cover a wide range of specializations, including finance, human resource management, marketing, international business, supply chain management, and more. The university provides both traditional classroom-based programs as well as distance learning options.Faculty: NIMS University has a diverse and experienced faculty consisting of professors, researchers, and industry professionals. The faculty members aim to impart knowledge, mentor students, and contribute to research and publications in their respective fields. They bring practical insights into the classroom to enhance the learning experience.Infr

individual_reviews.course: BBA in Aviation Management - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Good faculty members are here. They prepare us for interviews and internships.

content.Placements: NIMS University provides 100% placements to students. Top companies like Google, Amazon, Indigo, Oyo, and Bajaj Finance visit the college for placements. The university also provides paid internships to students. Students got a job from companies like Oyo, etc., as a consultant manager, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Hostels are best here as they provide fully AC and furnished rooms to students. It provides 3 sharing rooms with 3 beds, 3 study tables, and 3 separate almirahs for students. It also provides Wi-Fi and a cold water filter for students. The hostel also contains a mess in which food is served to the students of the best quality.

individual_reviews.course: BBA in Event Management - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It is good college for those who want to earn their degree easily, and its infrastructure is good.

content.Placements: Around 60% of students in my course get placed during the recruitment drive. The highest package is 5 LPA, while the lowest is 2 LPA, with an average package of 3 LPA. The top recruiting companies are TCS, Just Dial, Neelam Aqua, etc. The most common roles offered are in finance, sales, and marketing.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure at my college is very good. They provide a library and smart classrooms with air conditioning and Wi-Fi. The service in the hostel is on the point, they provide water heaters and water coolers on every floor. The food in the mess is above average. There is a sports complex that includes a basketball court, lawn tennis court, gym, and badminton courts.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: NIMS University is best fro MBA course.

content.Placements: Around 90% of students are placed. The highest salary package offered ranges from 15 LPA - 35 LPA and the lowest salary package offered ranges from 2 LPA- 9 LPA. Top companies are Google, Deloitte, Cognizant, and others. Marketing manager, financial manager, and other top positions are available.
content.Infrastructure: Our university infrastructure is first-rate. Its climate is healthy and natural. Students feel at ease in spacious classrooms. Each department has its library. Library has all of the top authors' reference books available. There are excellent labs with equipment available for medical students. There are 14 departments in all at NIMS.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Overall, it's a fine college with all facilities.

content.Placements: 80 out of 100 students get placed. The highest salary is 16 LPA, the lowest is 5 LPA, and the average is 8 LPA. All management-related roles such as consulting, product management, sales and marketing, general management, and operations are considered (with salaries typically around 16 LPA). All students have done internships.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is quite good. The campus has its own playgrounds, auditorium, faculty building, and residential area, with a significant amount of greenery. Because of this greenery, one can often see peacocks and other animals and birds wandering throughout the campus.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Fashion Design and Technology - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: NIMS is the best university, that you can visit.

content.Placements: NIMS University allows students who score at least 60 percent in senior secondary and gives scholarships to those who score more than 80 percent. The top companies for my course is D-decor and many textile industries, like cotton industry, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The building of the college is very good. NIMS provides projectors and the best quality seats in all the classes, as well as the lab in which we perform our textile projects and a machine lab for our stitching project. Hostels also have good infrastructure.

faqs.question: What is the process of admission for BBA at NIMS Institute of Management and Commerce?
faqs.answer: Candidates looking forward to getting admission to NIMS Institute of Management and Commerce for BBA must have passed Class 12 exam with at least 45% aggregate (40% aggregate in the case of students belonging to reserved category) in the qualifying exam. Those who apply need to submit their documents. NIMS Institute of Management and Commerce follows a six-step admission process. The same is mentioned below:Visit the official website of NIMS Institute of Management and Commerce or the NIMS University.Fill out the form and upload all the relevant documents.Make payment for the application form.Get the online receipt of the online application form submitted on the official website.The admission team will verify all the documents received by them.Pay the academic fee and confirm your seat at the institute.

faqs.question: When are NIMS Institute of Management and Commerce application forms out?
faqs.answer: MBA application forms are available in July and August, while NIMSEE registration for UG programs, such as BBA, begins in December, and admission applications to the NIMS Institute of Management and Commerce must be submitted by April or May. They accept CAT/MAT, etc. scores for the MBA program. MBA application forms are available online on the institute's website in July and August. Applications and registration forms for NIMSEE are typically made available in December.The entrance exam takes place between January and February. The outcome is released in March. The entire application process, which includes registering for the NIMSEE, taking the entrance exam, and applying for admission, ends in May or June for NIMS undergraduate programs.

faqs.question: Can I get into NIMS Institute of Management and Commerce with 70% in class 12th?
faqs.answer: Yes, if you do well on the NIMSEE exam and meet the other requirements for admission, you can get admissions to NIMS undergraduate programs even with a 70% score on the 12th board exam.A significant qualifying requirement for admission to NIMS's undergraduate programs, including BBA, BCA, B.Com, and BA (JMC), is a 12th percentage. A minimum of 50% of total points must be earned by general category students in their 12th grade exams from an accredited board.In 12th grade, the minimum pass percentage for reserved categories such as SC/ST is 45%.Students must take the NIMSEE entrance exam, which is administered by the NIMS Institute, in addition to their 12th grade results.Students are shortlisted for a subsequent admissions process based on their NIMSEE score and 12th percentile.

faqs.question: Which branch is best in BBA at NIMS Institute of Management and Commerce?
faqs.answer: The best NIMS branch to get a well-rounded business education is the BBA in Marketing and Analytics. Advertising, sales, customer behavior, competitive analysis, etc. are the main topics of BBA marketing. It prepares people for careers in media planning, digital marketing, brand/product management, etc. Organizational development, labor laws, hiring, training, and other topics are covered in BBA HR. Key positions include recruitment specialist and HR manager. Data analysis, machine learning, and visualization are all part of BBA analytics. Two important career options are business analyst and data scientist. The BBA in Marketing and BBA in Analytics appear to be the best specializations among the options available, taking into account the demands of the industry today and in the future.

reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with everything provided by the college.

review_content.Placements: Every year about 60% of students from our course get placed. The highest and the lowest salary package offered depends upon your interview and the firm. The average salary offered is Rs. 40,000 per month. We mainly get a dairy farm, poultry farm firms, Suguna Chicken and Ponlait dairy farms to get placed. Our college provides internships in different places starting from different veterinary colleges, dispensaries in and around Pondicherry and one month in dairy farms and followed by feed mills. Roles like an assistant veterinary officer, veterinary doctor and also inspector at the slaughterhouse are offered to the students.

AIIMS Bathinda students are introduced to concepts of Basic Life Support, First Aid, Preventing Bio-Hazards, Biomedical Waste Management, Professionalism, Skills in Communication, Humanities, Stress, and Time Management, Self-Development, and Career Enhancement. MBBS students can become Medical Writers, Healthcare Informatics, Health Administrators, Faculty Members, Hospital Administrators, and others. Below mentioned are some of the courses offered by AIIMS Bathinda and their respective eligibility.

placements.overview: AIIMS Bathinda placement report or brochure has not been released officially. However, students have disclosed the placement statistics on Shiksha students' review page. As per reviews, the average package offered over the past few years placements was INR 26,000 per month. The recruiters' list encompasses hospitals, healthcare organisations, research institutes, and academic institutions. Some of the top organisations where the AIIMS Bathinda alumni are placed include Max Healthcare, Apollo Hospitals, Fortis Healthcare, etc. The key highlights of AIIMS Bathinda placements for BSc, MBBS, and Certificate courses are tabulated below:'

faqs.answer: A:    AIIMS, Bathinda provides B.Sc in one specialization i.e., B.Sc in Nursing. For B.Sc AIIMS, Bathinda, INR 23,500 per month is a stipend. This stipend is the same for all AIIMS as all are counted among Central Institutes and the average package of this college is INR 30,000 per month and placement is good.

faqs.answer: A:    AIIMS Bathinda accepts NEET UG scores for admission to the MBBS course. In 2025, the NEET UG closing ranks varied between 1733 and 1798 for the General AI quota. So, considering the latest year cutoff, the chances are higher for a student with a NEET UG cutoff rank of 600 to get admission at AIIMS Bathinda for the MBBS course. faqs.question: Can I get AIIMS Bathinda with a NEET UG rank of 600?

faqs.answer: A:    NEET-UG results are accepted by AIIMS Bathinda for admission to its B.Sc. (Hons.) Nursing program. The minimum required score to be admitted is a passing grade of at least 50% in 10+2 from an accredited board. AIIMS Bathinda admits students based on their NEET exam performance; a score of 600 or higher is preferred for admission to this esteemed college. The cutoff score is reportedly approximately 550.

review_summary.college_name: AIIMS Bathinda Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: The departments, infrastructure, and facilities are really good.

content.Placements: In 2024, the first batch of our college graduates. Out of 50 students in our batch, 5 students get admitted to AIIMS for post-graduation in their first attempt at INI CET. Many also get selected for NEET PG. There is also an internal quota in AIIMS.
content.Infrastructure: There is free Wi-Fi available throughout the entire campus. The library is nice, and all books are available there. Classrooms are well-equipped with projectors, podiums, chairs, tables, whiteboards, and speakers. The labs are well-equipped, all practicals are performed, and all equipment is working and new.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: AIIMS, Bhatinda campus tour.

content.Placements: In any medical college in India, there is no such placement system. However, we have to do an internship for 10 to 12 months, and for this, we receive a stipend of Rs. 30,000 per month. Rather than placements, we have an internal quota for post-graduation from the same college, which is 50% for students of their own college.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of the colleges is just mesmerizing. In Bhatinda, there is a city nearby, where we can go out for parties. For daily needs, there is a shopping complex available on campus. Campus is beautiful and big. Also, many hospital blocks are still under construction. Hospital already has a capacity of 750 to 1,000 beds, which is quite a large amount.

admission_overview.description: AIIMS Bathinda admission 2025 for all courses is entrance-based. Candidates seeking admission to AIIMS Bathinda courses are required to meet the eligibility criteria of the relevant entrance exam to be considered for admission. The All India Institute of Medical Science, Bathinda, admission to the flagship MBBS course is done through the NEET UG entrance exam and counselling. Besides MBBS, AIIMS Bathinda offers a four-year BSc in Nursing and a Certificate course in Respiratory Therapy. Admission to both the courses mentioned above is also entrance-based.

paragraphs: AIIMS Bathinda admissionin the MBBS course is conducted through NTA NEET. Interested candidates are required to appear for theNEET UG entrance examto get shortlisted for admission. Candidates must start their admission process by meeting the course-specific eligibility criteria and filling out the application form for the relevant entrance exam. Interested candidates can check out the steps below for the AIIMS Bathinda admission process:
Step 1: AIIMS Bathinda Admission Registration Process 2025

To apply for the AIIMS Bathinda MBBS course, candidates are required to apply for theNEET UGthrough the official website of NTA. Aspirants must make sure that they fill out the NEET application form and pay the required application fee before the deadline.
Step 2: AIIMS Bathinda Selection Process 2025
After appearing for the NEET UG entrance exam, candidates who meet the AIIMS Bathinda cutoff will be called for the exam-specific counselling round where the seat allotment process will be done.
Step 3: NEET Counselling Round 2025
After the final seat allotment, selected candidates are required to pay the admission fee to confirm their admission.

AIIMS Bathinda course feesdiffer from course to course. The total fee is inclusive of multiple components such as admission fees, tuition fees, alumni fees, etc. Candidates are required to pay the fee either every six months or annually. They must pay the tution fee after getting selected forAIIMS Bathinda admission. Interested candidates can check out the below table for theAIIMS Bathinda course fee:
Note:This information is sourced from the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

Candidates are allotted seats in the MBBS programme offered atAIIMS Bathindabased on valid scores obtained in NEET. The applicants will have to go through the counselling process to secure a seat at the institute.AIIMS BathindaMBBS seat intakeis as follows:
Note:This information is sourced from the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

faqs.question: Which branch is the best of AIIMS?
faqs.answer: AIIMS Delhi has also been crowned the top medical college in India for the NIRF Ranking 2023. AIIMS Jodhpur has risen three places in the rankings. AIIMS Bhubaneswar's NIRF 2023 ranking has risen from 26th to 17th. AIIMS Rishikesh's ranking has also risen from 48th to 22nd among India's top medical colleges. The best branch/department to pursue MD/MS in at AlIMS Delhi is highly subjective and can vary depending on your personal interests and career goals. However, some of the top departments at AlIMS Delhi include: Department of Anatomy. Department of Biochemistry.

faqs.question: How are MBBS placements at AIIMS Bathinda?
faqs.answer: At AIIMS Bathinda, placements for MBBS graduates differ from those in other fields, like engineering or management. After obtaining their MBBS, students must do a year-long mandated internship at the institution's affiliated hospital. Many students subsequently pursue further education or specialisation in various fields of medicine via MD, MS, or other postgraduate medical programs. The average monthly pay is approximately INR 26,000 . The highest compensation offered was INR 1 Lacs per month . These figures might vary greatly depending on the individual's talents, experience, field of specialization, and the sort of company they work for.

faqs.question: Who are the top recruiters of AIIMS Bathinda?
faqs.answer: AIIMS Bathinda Placements: In the placement season, All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Bathinda, offered an average salary package of Rs. 26,000 monthly to MBBS graduates. The highest salary package was Rs. 1 Lakh per month. Top recruiters were: Apollo Hospitals Fortis Hospitals Max Healthcare Manipal Hospitals Medanta Hospital And a lot of vacancies were there for freshers with a high salary package.

faqs.question: How are B Sc. placements at AIIMS Bathinda?
faqs.answer: AIIMS, Bathinda provides B.Sc in one specialization i.e., B.Sc in Nursing. For B.Sc AIIMS, Bathinda, INR 23,500 per month is a stipend. This stipend is the same for all AIIMS as all are counted among Central Institutes and the average package of this college is INR 30,000 per month and placement is good.

description: AIIMS Bathinda cutoff 2025 is available on this page for various accepting exams. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the cutoff details across different rounds and categories. Other important updates are as follows:

AIIMS Bathinda NEET UG cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final seat allotment result for admission to the MBBS course. The cutoff was released for several categories belonging to the AI quota. For the General AI quota, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 1798 for MBBS admission. Candidates can refer to the table below to view the first and last round cutoffs 2025 for the General AI category students.

AIIMS Bathinda MBBS cutoff 2025 was 1798 for the students belonging to the General AI quota. Similarly, for the OBC category students, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 2482 for admission to the MBBS course. Comparing both categories, the cutoff rank was more competitive for the General category students as compared to the OBC category for MBBS admission. For other categories and rounds, use the provided filters.

AIIMS Bathinda accepts the NEET UG entrance exam for selecting students to the MBBS course. Candidates with a valid score are then eligible for the NEET UG counselling. For 2026 admission, aspirants must refer to the table below to view some of the important NEET UG 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

Candidates preparing for admission can refer to the table below to view or download the NEET UG round and year-wise consolidated cutoff list. This will help students to understand the past three years' cutoff trends.
AIIMS Bathinda INI CET cutoff 2026 has been released for the postgraduate courses MD, MS, M.Ch., etc. At Round 3, the closing ranks ranged from 81 to 15948 for students in the General AI quota.

Considering the ranks, the most competitive for admission was MD in Radio diagnosis, with a lowest cutoff rank of 81. On the otherhand, the least competitive was MD in Forensic Medicine & Toxicology, with INI CET 2026 cutoff rank of for admission in the General category.

In the table below, candidates can find the INI CET round- and category-wise cut-off details for admission to various PG medical courses. For General AI category students, the top three most competitive courses for admission were MD in Radio diagnosis, MD in Dermatology and MD in Paediatrics, with Round 3 closing ranks of 81, 87 and 354, respectively.

INI CET counselling is conducted in four rounds: mock round, first round, second round, and open round. All the rounds of counselling are conducted online. Candidates appearing for admission via INI CET can refer to the table provided below to view or download the round and year-wise INI CET cutoff lists.
AIIMS Bathinda B.Sc. cutoff 2025 was 1298 in the last round. In 2024, the last round closing rank for the same course was 1136 for the students belonging to the General AI quota.
For the OBC category students, the AIIMS Nursing cutoff 2025 for the B.Sc. course was 1959 in the last round. For other categories and rounds, use the provided filters.

The AIIMS Bathinda cutoff 2025 has been released based on the AIIMS Paramedical exam. The cutoff was released for different categories such as General, OBC, SC, ST and EWS categories belonging to the All India quota. The cutoff among the General AI category was 87.
For candidates belonging to the SC AI category, the cutoff fell at 798. The most sought-after course among the SC AI category candidates was .

gallery_page.college_name: AIIMS Bathinda Photos & Videos

facilities: Well equipped Conference hall and Seminar hall.

reviews.review_heading: The departments, infrastructure, and facilities are really good.
reviews.review_text: There is free Wi-Fi available throughout the entire campus. The library is nice, and all books are available there. Classrooms are well-equipped with projectors, podiums, chairs, tables, whiteboards, and speakers. The labs are well-equipped, all practicals are performed, and all equipment is working and new.

reviews.review_heading: AIIMS, Bhatinda campus tour.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the colleges is just mesmerizing. In Bhatinda, there is a city nearby, where we can go out for parties. For daily needs, there is a shopping complex available on campus. Campus is beautiful and big. Also, many hospital blocks are still under construction. Hospital already has a capacity of 750 to 1,000 beds, which is quite a large amount.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty is kind and knowledgeable.Patient load is high so great chance to learn things
reviews.review_text: Hostels are very clean and spacious. Greenery is present in each one of the step with different types of plants and our campus is far from crowded area where you can feel the pure air. Labs are present for each department and wifi is present in both college and hostel. Library 24/7 for boys and for girls it's till 10 pm.

reviews.review_heading: The beautiful campus of AIIMS Bathinda.
reviews.review_text: The campus is completely Wi-Fi enabled, and the library is well-spaced, air-conditioned, and open 24x7. It has a lot of books and a computer lab. The hostel is clean and well maintained, and the mess food is of moderate quality.

reviews.review_heading: The beautiful campus of AIIMS Bathinda .
reviews.review_text: The campus is fully air-conditioned, and Wi-Fi facilities are available in the college, campus mess, and hostel. There is a 24x7 library facility with a lot of books available. Also, various sports facilities and clubs are there inside the institution.

reviews.review_heading: Best college for pursuing MBBS.
reviews.review_text: The library is fully air-conditioned and almost all the books are available in the library. A Wi-Fi facility is also available and computers are also available in the library. The hostel is neat and clean. Sports facilities are available and the canteen provides good meals.

reviews.review_heading: AIIMS Bathinda: Love of my life.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of my college is very good as it is a newly built college and hospital. The Wi-Fi facilities are available here for 24 hours, and the password is given to every student and faculty studying and working here, respectively. The library facility is available in my college.

reviews.review_heading: AIIMS Bathinda : strength of my life.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of my college is very good, as it is a newly built hospital and college. The whole campus has a Wi-Fi facility and students are provided with the password. The library also has Wi-Fi, a computer, and a journal facility available for the students and the faculty.

reviews.review_heading: I'm totally satisfied with my dream college, and faculty and crowd are very good.
reviews.review_text: As this is a newly built college, the infrastructure is quite appreciable. All the lecture theatres and library are well-built. All the seats here are very comfortable for seating. The mess food quality can't be compared with home, so it will always be rated as bad. But the cafeteria and canteen are available, and they are quite good.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has done its best to keep the level up.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure and facilities are pretty good. Hostels are new and good. Mess food and sports facilities are average as there is no proper playground. Dining area is pretty small for the number of people eating there.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied because of fee structure and infrastructure but dissatisfied due to bad quality of food.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facilities are often not working, and there are restrictions on the Wi-Fi. The labs are functioning well, and classrooms are good with AC service. The library is also nice, but for girls, it is open only for 12 hours compared to 24 hours for boys. The hostel has rooms allocated for two students, and there is a reading hall for studying. However, there is no AC in the rooms, and no Wi-Fi available. The washrooms are not very clean, and in winter, the geysers do not work properly. The mess ...

admission_overview.college_name: City Group of College Admissions 2025: Selection, Eligibility, Fee

admission_process.title: City Group of Colleges Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: City Group of Colleges admission 2025is open for all courses. The College offers various courses at the UG and PG levels through its twelve constituent colleges.City Group of Collegesis affiliated withAKTU,DR. Ram Manohar Lohia Avadh UniversityandUniversity of Lucknow. The flagship programmes offered at City Group of College include LLB, BCA, BBA and MBA, among others. Admission to all City Group of Colleges courses is merit-based. Candidates willing to apply can either apply online through the official website of the College or visit the college campus with relevant documents for registration.

To get admission to any of the CGC courses, candidates must fulfil the basic eligibility requirements. The selection criteria for all courses is merit-based. Tabulated below are some of the course-wise eligibility & selection criteria for CGC course admission 2025:
Make your course selection here, to check the eligibility and selection criteria for all City Group of Colleges courses.

City Group of Colleges admission process is a multi-step process that begins with the release of application forms. The CGC application forms are released online on the official website as well as offline. Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria of their desired course must apply to the course before the deadline. Check the steps below to read about the City Group of College admission process in detail:

headings.text: City Group of College Admission 2025: Eligibility & Selection Criteria
Steps for City Group of College Admission Process 2025

lists: Registration:Visit the official website and fill in the basic registration details or visit the college campus with all required documents for registration. Candidates are required to pay the application fee amounting to INR 500.
Selection:The selection criteria for all courses is merit-based. CGC releases a merit-list on its official website, with the names of selected candidates.
Reservation and Enrollment:Candidates, whose is in the merit-list, are required to accept the admission offer by paying the seat confirmation fees.

courses_data.name: City Group of Colleges LLB Admissions Admissions 2025
courses_data.description: A 3-year LLB programme, which is the flagship course of City Group of Colleges, is offered in full-time mode to students who have graduated with at least 45% marks. Admissions to CGC LLB course is based on candidates merit in the qualifying exam.

faqs.question: Is entrance exam accepted for LLB at City Group of Colleges?
faqs.answer: The selection criteria at City Group of Colleges is merit-based to shortlist candidates for LLB admission. Aspirants can view their result by entering roll number and date of birth. After completion of the entrance exam, the university releases a category-wise merit list to announce the names of the shortlisted candidates.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission at City Group of Colleges?
faqs.answer: Yes, admission to all the City Group of Colleges courses is merit-based. However, candidates are required to meet the minimum eligibility criteria defined by the college followed by filling out the application form. The City Group of Colleges application forms are released in both online and offline modes.

faqs.question: How can I take admission in City Group of Colleges?
faqs.answer: In order to apply for various courses at City Group of Colleges, candidates should meet the last educational qualification set by the college. faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for the BPharma programme at CGC?
faqs.answer: Applicants must have completed Class 12 or its equivalent from a recognised board with at least 50% aggregate marks. Students must have studied Physics and Chemistry as compulsory subjects and can choose one elective subject from Biotechnology, Biology, or a technical vocational subject in Chemistry. Candidates must secure a minimum aggregate score of 45% (40% for SC/ST candidates) in the qualifying exam. However, admission to the BPharma programme is determined by the combined scores from Class 12 and the accepted CUET exam.

hostel_campus.college_name: City Group of College Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure is good, and the faculty is supportive, with improved placement statistics.
reviews.review_text: The smart classrooms and well-equipped labs are complemented by comfortable hostels with security and basic medical care. Sports facilities are also available on campus, and the mess provides hygienic food, with dining facilities available at the college, offering the best medical care on campus.

reviews.review_heading: City Group of College is a good college in Lucknow and has good facilities.
reviews.review_text: This college offers the best hostel facilities in Lucknow, and the hostel canteen provides protein-rich food that promotes good health. The hostel staff's behavior is good toward the students. The hostel changes the food pattern weekly and provides healthy food.

reviews.review_heading: Best college with best educated teachers and high rate of placement.
reviews.review_text: There is a good quality of infrastructure and good quality of education. The best infrastructure for the best education. Facilities of Wi-Fi, labs, and a good library with all course-related subjects. All facilities are good and have good behavior for students. I highly recommend.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure with all the good facilities.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure was good. Classrooms are air-conditioned, a big seminar hall for events, programs, and conferences, well-maintained hygiene facilities, and a lift for staff members. The college also provided parking space for students and faculty.

reviews.review_heading: This is a very good college, students can take admission and gain knowledge.
reviews.review_text: The college facilities are very crucial. Wi-Fi, library, and labs are permanently used for students. The hostel provides good food. Sports and medical facilities are available at my college. Compared to other colleges, our college has better sports available, like cricket, football, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Nice environment but didn't get college vibes as expected.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are airy and big in size but there is no air conditioning. Libraries are available on each floor. Neither I nor any of my friends live in the college hostel, so I can't provide a genuine opinion. A big ground is available where there is a basketball court and a volleyball court. Free parking is available with CCTV cameras.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by City Law College, City Group of CollegesReviewed on 17 Nov 2024)
reviews.review_heading: If you want a degree only so you can come here otherwise I will not recommend this college for you.
reviews.review_text: There is no boys' hostel on the Jankipuram campus of City Law College. There is only one girls' hostel, which has no warden, but a male staff member is in charge and visits daily. The food quality is not good; it is just okay but needs major improvement.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by City Law College, City Group of CollegesReviewed on 26 Oct 2024)
reviews.review_heading: My college is considered as one of the best law colleges in Lucknow.
reviews.review_text:
College infrastructure is well established, clean and student-friendly.
Classrooms are very good with the facilities of AC, lighting, fans, smart boards, projectors, microphones, etc. Library is very big with all the important books of law as well as other subjects. For law students, the library provides a free MANUPATRA subscription. 
Wi-Fi facility is also provided to all the students for free. Hostel facilities are available for girls in very affordable fees with good food quality and rooms w...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by City Law College, City Group of CollegesReviewed on 16 Oct 2024)
reviews.review_heading: If you want to become a judge then you can join City law College.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good. Hostel facilities are available only for girls, but the college is working on providing hostel facilities for boys as well. Canteen facilities are available, but medical and sports facilities are lacking.

reviews.review_heading: Strong industry connections and excellent placements with room for curriculum improvement.
reviews.review_text: City Group of Colleges offers modern facilities like high-speed Wi-Fi, proper smart classrooms, well-structured labs, and a vast library. Hostels are comfortable and provide many amenities, including proper mess food, cleanliness, and a canteen that offers snacks. On-campus medical facilities are also available, along with sports and physical activities like a gym and various game courts.

reviews.review_heading: Teachers are very nice and supportive.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is very good; all the classrooms are air-conditioned, and library facilities are provided at a very low cost. All the classes have smart classrooms, and there is a courtroom for practicing. The faculty members are nice and very supportive.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by City Law College, City Group of CollegesReviewed on 2 Jun 2024)
reviews.review_heading: Absolutely disappointed because of bad infrastructure, facilities and placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is not so good, but the classrooms and the library are really in good condition. The entire campus is fully air conditioned. It has a canteen but the quality of food is not so good and it also lacks variety in the food menu. The bad thing about the college is that they don't have facilities for sports and games.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by City School Of Pharmacy, City Group of CollegesReviewed on 6 Jan 2024)
reviews.review_heading: Really not satisfied because of department, no placements, but good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: For practical, the infrastructure is good, but qualified teachers are not available. In terms of facilities, Wi-Fi is available, labs, well-clean bathrooms, classrooms, library available. Hostel is quite good in terms of hygiene, food, infrastructure, etc.

reviews.review_heading: The college provides good education but it lacks in placements.
reviews.review_text: The facilities in the college campus are good and the classrooms are well maintained. There are ACs. Classrooms with sanitized chairs are there. Food in the canteen is not so good. In the name of sports, there is a basketball court. Here you can find a big library.

reviews.review_heading: City college - the worst college in whole city.
reviews.review_text: They don't have hostel facilities or connected linked hostels. The labs, classrooms, etc. were more than good. There is a school canteen with basic stuff available at market rate. There is not much focus or space available for ground since our campus is too limited in space. We hardly see any activity or involvement of students in sports.

college_info.college_name: City Group of College

data.description: City Group of College (CGC) follows a semester-based system for its BSc programme. The academic year is divided into two semesters spanning six months each, and students generally enroll in a specific set of courses each semester. The college offers three BSc specialisations, with a three to four years of course duration. The curriculum is divided into six to eight semesters. This approach provides an organised method for learning and evaluation, maintaining educational benchmarks and preparing students for future academic pursuits.

MBA/PGDM is the most popular programme offered at the Sai Group of Institutions. The institute offers MBA programmes in International Business and Finance. The MBA programme offered by Sai Group of Institutions is a full-time, two-year programme, affiliated with HNB Garhwal Central University. The institute also offers 100% placement assistance to students. The MBA programme offered by Sai Group of Institutions is highly popular among students due to its industry-centric curriculum. review_summary.college_name: Sai Group of Institutions Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Operation Theater - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Sai Group of Institutions is a very nice college.

content.Placements: 75% of students are placed in our college. 70 LPA - 80 LPA is the highest package and the lowest is 50 LPA - 60 LPA in our college. Many companies recruiting from our college are Max, KMC, Coronation, and Tata. Maybe 50-60 students got internships in different companies like Max and Tata.
content.Infrastructure: Good facilities are available in our college. Library and classrooms in our college are provided. Wi-Fi, labs, and good quality of facilities are available in our hostel, and is food available in the mess and canteen. Medical facilities, sports, and games are available in our college. Good quality facilities are available in our college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Agriculture - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: Students got internships from our course in companies from Sai Group of Institute Technology College. Roles offered in the course are modern agricultural practices in farmer fields and off-seasonal crop fruits, and vegetables produced information in farmers.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure available for our course/department e.g. Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and library. The quality of the facilities in our hostel is good. The quality of food available in mess and canteen is good. Medical facilities are available. Sports and games are available in our college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Agriculture - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: College is good and teachers are polite.

content.Placements: As far I see there are no M.Ch., students who have been placed in any company so far. 20 LPA is the highest package provided. There are seniors who got into good company our seniors have been placed in well-reputed organizations and they got good positions.
content.Infrastructure: As I don't stay in hostel. Library is good and well-equipped.
content.Faculty: As I saw the faculty of our course B.Sc. Agriculture is very nice to us. They also provide knowledge out of courses to understand us more. The best faculty are in our course B.Sc. Agriculture. The teachers of our course that's B.Sc. Agriculture is the best. They teach us so well and also provide us better knowledge as far as I studied there is no complaint about their teaching every Friday we visit to field for practical with our teachers are cooperative.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Agriculture - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Amazing college experience.

content.Placements: The total percentage of students that can be placed in our course is approximately 80%. The highest package is 8 LPA. The lowest package is 4 LPA. Top recruiting company is Bayers for our course. The percentage of students get internships 85%.
content.Infrastructure: Academic facilities like labs, classrooms, and library are available. Hostel infrastructure like room quality, cleaning mess, and hygiene are there. Mess and canteen are hygienic, tasty and variety of food is available. Medical and hospital services are available. Sports and recreation facilities like ground, court, event, field quality are available.

individual_reviews.course: MBA in Financial Management - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Sai Business School, Sai Group of Institutions best college for MBA and other management course.

content.Placements: The salary offered is Rs. 25,000. We have monthly opportunities in Dehradun, and we also have great exposure to metropolitan cities. The top recruiting companies include Airtel, Max, Idea, Vodafone, Tata Group, Bajaj Allianz, Tata Consultancy, Mahindra Capital, Byju's, and Physics Wallah.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good; we have Wi-Fi and canteen facilities, and all the equipment is well maintained. Our classrooms and library are well-furnished. The college is situated in the center of Dehradun. All classrooms are equipped with the latest tools, digital boards, and seminar materials.

admission_overview.college_name: Sai Group of Institutions Course Admissions 2025: Eligibility, Selection, Application

admission_process.title: Sai Group of Institutions Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Sai Group of Institutions admissionsare primarily merit-based. The institute shortlists candidates based on their merit in the entrance exam/ interview conducted by the institute.Sai Group of Institutionsoffers courses at UG, PG and diploma levels across various streams such as Management, Science, Computer Applications, etc. SGI offers courses through various institutes. Interested candidates can apply online for admission to preferred course.

SGI Dehradun offers programmes in affiliation with universities such asHNB Garhwal,Sri Dev Sum Uttarakhand University, HNBU Medical Education, VMSB Uttarakhand and Uttarakhand Board of Technical Education. Candidates can fill out the form on the institute's website or collect the form from the college campus. Below are the key highlights related toSGI Dehradun admissions:
Particulars
SGI Dehradun Admission Highlights 2025
Mode of study
Programmes Offered
Admission status 2025
How to apply?
https://sipas.edu.in/ or offline
Level of programmes offered
Popular programmes
SGI Dehradun Brochure 2025
SGI Dehradun Prospectus

The institute offers admission to courses based on the merit of the aspirants in the entrance exam conducted by the institute. Candidates are required to fulfil the eligibility criteria set by the institute for admission. The basic eligibility for UG courses is Class 12, whereas graduation is required for PG programmes. Below are popularSai Group of Institutions coursesalong with their eligibility and selection criteria:

SGI, Dehradun admission processincludes registration, Merit of entrance examination/personal interview for admission confirmation. The admission process begins in April with the academic sessions starting in mid-July/August every year. Candidates must follow the steps below to get a seat in the institute:
STEP 1: SGI, Dehradun Application Process 2025

Candidates are required to apply online on the official website of the institute. Candidates can also visit the campus for prospectus and the application form. Aspirants need to pay an application fee of INR 200 in the form of DD for offline submission.
STEP 2: Selection Rounds
SGI, Dehradun, shortlists candidates based on the merit of entrance examination/interviews. Candidates have to make a personal visit to the college for a conference with a counsellor.
STEP 3:Admission Confirmation

Once selection rounds are over, candidates are required to report at the campus for document verification. Aspirants also need to pay theSai Group of Institutions feeto confirm their seat in the institute.

courses_data.name: Sai Group of Institutions BSc Admissions 2025
courses_data.description: Sai Group of Institutions offers a BSc programme for three or four years at the UG level. The institute offers BSc in three-years in various specialisations such asMedical Microbiology, MLT, Nursing and IT. BSc is available in Forestry,AgricultureandHorticulturefor four years. Candidates who have completed Class 12 in relevant subjects with aggregate ranging between 45% and 50% are eligible to apply for the BSc course. Admission to the programme is based on merit of the aspirants in the entrance exam or interview.

faqs.question: How much is the fee for BSc at Sai Group of Institutions?
faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for Sai Group of Institutions BSc ranges betweenINR 1.20 LacsandINR 5.80 lakh.Candidates are required to pay the course fee to confirm their seat in the institute. The fee above excludes one-time admission fee, recurring fee, uniform fee and hostel charges.

faqs.answer: Sai Group of Institutions shortlists candidates for BSc programmes based on their score in the entrance exam or interview conducted by the institute. Besides, aspirants must also fulfil the eligibility requirements set by the institute. Once selected, candidates need to pay the course fee to confirm their seat in the institute.

placement_data.title: Sai Group of Institutions Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: The Sai Group of Institutions placement report recorded a highest package of INR 41 LPA in 2024. The average package stood at INR 37 LPA . Over 400 recruiters took part in the recruitment process and made 632 job offers. A total of 523 students got placed from various courses and recorded a placement rate of 82% . Moreover, the season concluded with a total of 523 pre placement offers and 412 summer placements. The institute saw recruitments from sectors such as physiotherapy, computer science, management, paramedical and allied sciences as well.

college_info.college_name: B.N. Patel Institute of Paramedical and Science: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Placements

highlights.summary: BN Patel Institute of Paramedical & Science admissions are open. Candidates can contact the institute for application form.

college_info.intro: BN Patel Institute of Paramedical and Science courses are varied while focusing on paramedical courses. The university offers courses, such as BSc, MSc and PG Diploma which are its most popular programmes and offer multiple specialisations. The eligibility criteria for all the programmes is a minimum aggregate of 50% in Class 12 or graduation. Candidates can look at the courses below to get an idea of the tuition fees, eligibility criteria, and entrance exams required for admission in BNIPS courses:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: BN Patel Institute of Paramedical and Science primarily offers courses in the medical stream. Candidates applying for admission into the programme can apply for programmes, such as BSc, MSc, PG Diploma etc. The institute offers multiple specialisations, such as Operation Theatre Technology, Renal Dialysis Technology, etc. The BSc programme is four years long with one year of mandatory internship. The MSc programme at the university is two years long while the PG Diploma programme is an year long. Other courses, such as Bachelor in Optometry, General Nursing and Midwifery and Auxillary Nursing and Midwifery are , and , respectively. Candidates can have a look at the table below to get an idea eligibility criteria of all the courses offered by the institute:

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, candidates can get into BNIPS Gujarat BSc programme if they have been able to secure 60% in Class 12. The eligibility criteria for the BSc programme is a minimum aggregate of 50% in Class 12. With a score of 60%, candidates should apply for admission into the programme, as admission will take place on the merit secured in Class 12 exams. The selection will depend on the number of seats available for the programme and the merit of candidates who have applied.
faqs.question: Can I get a seat for BSc at BNIPS Gujarat with 60% in Class 12?

faqs.answer: A:    Candidates who have passed Class 12 Science - Group A, B or AB; Gujarati or English Medium are eligible to apply for BSc programme at BN Patel Institute of Paramedical and Science. BSc is a four-year course offered by the institute. The four-year programme includes one-year internship.
faqs.question: What is the eligibility for BSc at BN Patel Institute of Paramedical and Science?

faqs.answer: A:    BN Patel Institute of Paramedical and Science specifies the minimum qualification required to apply for a course. The basic eligibility for UG courses is Class 12. Aspirants seeking admission in PG programmes must have passed graduation. Below is course-wise eligibility for BN Patel Institute:CourseCommon EligibilityBScClass 12 Science - Group A, B or AB; Gujarati or English MediumMScGraduationBOPTMClass 12 Science - Group A, B or AB; Gujarati or English MediumPG DiplomaBSc in relevant subjectsCertificateClass 10 or Class 12

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Physician Assistant - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Our college is not worth it as it doesn't have a canteen facility and hostel.

review_content.Placements: According to the past few batches of history, no one got placed through college placements. After complications, local hospitals like civil hospitals and Zydus may offer a job, but the salary is not good and even not enough for the out-state students. Many hospitals like Zydus provide salary increments up to 20% every year, which is a good thing.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is no Wi-Fi in classrooms or even in the library. Our college has no hostel facilities and not even a canteen, which is the worst part.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Physiotherapy (BPT) - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: It is the best college for physiotherapy.

review_content.Placements: Around 10-15 % of students get placed in this course. Approximately salary offered is from Rs.10,000 per month to 2 lacks per month. Government hospitals and sports companies are top recruiting companies. Above 75% of the students are getting internships in government hospitals.
review_content.Infrastructure: We have a great infrastructure in our college. Wi-Fi is available in every lobby, and there are 2 libraries. We have a chemistry lab, physiotherapy pods, physics lab, and many others. We have clean rooms in the hostel and the food quality is good. Sports arrangements are also there. Interior of our college is excellent.

faqs.answer: As per Shiksha student reviews, BN Patel Institute of Paramedical and Science BSc programme enjoys a rating of 3.5/5. Candidates applying for admission into the programme should note that the university offers five specialisations for its BSc programme with an year of mandatory internship. The faculty of the programme is highly rated as per reviews and the course also enjoys a favourable rating for value for money. Therefore, candidates can consider BSc at BNIPS Gujarat to be worth the investment.
faqs.question: Q: Is it worth pursuing BSc at BN Patel Institute of Paramedical and Science?

faqs.answer: BN Patel Institute of Paramedical and Science admission to courses is based on merit of the aspirants in the last qualifying exam. The institute evaluates the application form of the aspirants for verification. The institute considers the scores of the candidates in Class 12 for UG courses and graduation for PG programmes. Once selected, aspirants must pay the course fee to confirm their seats.
faqs.question: Q: How can I get admission at BN Patel Institute of Paramedical and Science?

faqs.answer: No, BNIPS Gujarat is not hard to get. Candidates can secure admission into the programme if they have a minimum aggregate of 50% in their last qualifying exam. Admission into the institute are merit-based and thus there are no entrance exams one has to give to secure admission into the programme. Candidates can apply for direct admission once they have cleared their Class 12 or graduation.
