overview_faqs.question: Is it worth pursuing BSc at BN Patel Institute of Paramedical and Science?
overview_faqs.answer: As per Shiksha student reviews, BN Patel Institute of Paramedical and Science BSc programme enjoys a rating of 3.5/5. Candidates applying for admission into the programme should note that the university offers five specialisations for its BSc programme with an year of mandatory internship. The faculty of the programme is highly rated as per reviews and the course also enjoys a favourable rating for value for money. Therefore, candidates can consider BSc at BNIPS Gujarat to be worth the investment.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fee range for the courses offered at B.N. Patel Institute of Paramedical and Science?
overview_faqs.answer: The fee bracket for programs offerred by the B.N. Patel Institute of Paramedical and Science is approximately INR 35000 - INR 300000.

overview_faqs.question: Is it worth to consider B.N. Patel Institute of Paramedical and Science as a good Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: B.N. Patel Institute of Paramedical and Science is a renowned institution offering Certificate, PG Diploma, M.Sc, B.Sc, BOPTM, BPT. Students can choose these courses to embark on their careers in the field of Medicine & Health Sciences, Nursing, Banking, Finance & Insurance, Business & Management Studies, Science. The institute is staffed with highly skilled and experienced faculty members dedicated to delivering these programs. B.N. Patel Institute of Paramedical and Science boasts an impressive review rating of 3.8 based on student feedback at Shiksha. Additionally, it has received a rating of 3.5 for Campus Life, 3.5 for Placements, 4.25 for Faculty, and 3.5 for Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: B.N. Patel Institute of Paramedical and Science Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Imaging Technology - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Good but there are some issues as ususal.

content.Placements: An average of 70% of students choose this. There are some issues with placements, and a few faculty members can be annoying to students. Strict discipline is maintained. Some students get placed in this college because they lack other resources. Only one teacher is mainly responsible for most of the work.
content.Infrastructure: The course infrastructure is very good as it was directed by Sardar Patel University. However, there is no Wi-Fi for students, and hostel facilities are not available. The canteen is excellent but located on another campus. Labs and classrooms lack proper air-conditioner services, and some CPUs are not functioning.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Imaging Technology - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Review of B.N. Patel Institute of Paramedical and Science.

content.Placements: Almost all students got placed in the nearby diagnostic centers or hospitals. The top role offered is radio technician. They provide postings during the curriculum. Our college provides internship opportunities after the final year for a year. After completion, you will get a degree at convocation.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provides us with all facilities. The hostel facility is available for girls. The food served in the hostel is good. The library is available in our college. They provide medical facilities. Labs are available for lab technician courses. They don't provide sports facilities.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Physician Assistant - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Our college is not worth it as it doesn't have a canteen facility and hostel.

content.Placements: According to the past few batches of history, no one got placed through college placements. After complications, local hospitals like civil hospitals and Zydus may offer a job, but the salary is not good and even not enough for the out-state students. Many hospitals like Zydus provide salary increments up to 20% every year, which is a good thing.
content.Infrastructure: There is no Wi-Fi in classrooms or even in the library. Our college has no hostel facilities and not even a canteen, which is the worst part.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Physiotherapy (BPT) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: It is the best college for physiotherapy.

content.Placements: Around 10-15 % of students get placed in this course. Approximately salary offered is from Rs.10,000 per month to 2 lacks per month. Government hospitals and sports companies are top recruiting companies. Above 75% of the students are getting internships in government hospitals.
content.Infrastructure: We have a great infrastructure in our college. Wi-Fi is available in every lobby, and there are 2 libraries. We have a chemistry lab, physiotherapy pods, physics lab, and many others. We have clean rooms in the hostel and the food quality is good. Sports arrangements are also there. Interior of our college is excellent.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Imaging Technology - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: I absolutely recommend joining our college.

content.Placements: Placements were good. I thought our future was secure because we were passing out of this college. They provided fast and high-quality placements. Internships were excellent throughout the college.
content.Infrastructure: Regarding facilities, they provided 3 or 4 labs, free Wi-Fi connections, and libraries. Private or separate classrooms were also provided. Hostels were available only for girls, so I didn’t know about that.
content.Faculty: Faculty was very good and educated. They were always happy and behaved well. They were always available or ready to help with our queries. From my experience, the exams were much easier, and helpful questions were asked in the external exams. There were many courses available. They helped our future.

admission_overview.college_name: B.N. Patel Institute of Paramedical and Science Admission 2025: Fees, Courses, Eligibility and Selection

admission_process.title: BN Patel Institute of Paramedical & Science Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: BN Patel Institute of Paramedical & Science admissionsare merit-based. The institute considers the qualifying exam scores of the candidates for admission.BN Patel Institute of Paramedical and Scienceoffers courses at UG, PG, diploma and certificate levels in Paramedical Science. The institute offers courses in affiliation withSardar Patel University. The courses include BSc, MSc, BOPTM PG Diploma and certificate. Interested candidates can apply for the preferred course.

The institute offers admission to candidates based on their merit. Aspirants must pass a minimum of Class 12 for UG and graduation for PG courses. Candidates fulfilling the eligibility requirements can apply for admission. Below areBN Patel Institute of Paramedical & Science coursesalong with their eligibility and selection criteria:

BN Patel Institute of Paramedical & Science admissionsare currently open. Candidates need to fill out the application form for the preferred course for admission. Below are the steps to get a seat in the institute:
Step 1:Candidates must fulfil the eligibility criteria to fill out the application form. Aspirants must contact the admission team or fill out the enquiry form on the official website for the form.

Step 2:The institute selects candidates for admission to UG, PG, diploma and certificate courses based on their score in the last qualifying exam. The institute also evaluates the form of the aspirants to confirm their eligibility.
Step 3:The institute informs the candidates about their selection. Further, shortlisted aspirants need to pay theBN Patel Institute of Paramedical & Science feeto confirm their seats.

courses_data.name: BN Patel Institute of Paramedical & Science BSc Admission 2025
courses_data.description: BN Patel Institute offers a four-year BSc course including a one-year internship. The institute offers BSc in various specialisations such as Renal Dialysis Technology,Imaging TechnologyandClinical Lab Technologyat the UG level. Candidates who have completed Class 12 in the Science stream can apply for the BSc programme.

faqs.question: Which are the BSc specialisations offered at BN Patel Institute of Paramedical and Science?
faqs.answer: BN Patel Institute of Paramedical and Science offers a four-year BSc course with one-year internship at the UG level. Candidates who have completed Class 12 in Science stream can apply for BSc. Below are the BSc specialisations offered by the institute:Renal Dialysis TechnologyImaging TechnologyClinical Lab Technology

faqs.question: How can I get admission in BSc at BN Patel Institute of Paramedical and Science?
faqs.answer: BN Patel Institute of Paramedical and Science offers admission to BSc programme based on merit of the aspirants in the last qualifying exam. Candidates must have passed Class 12 Science - Group A, B or AB; Gujarati or English Medium to get admission in the BSc course. Once selected, aspirants need to pay the course fee to confirm their seats.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility for BSc at BN Patel Institute of Paramedical and Science?
faqs.answer: Candidates who have passed Class 12 Science - Group A, B or AB; Gujarati or English Medium are eligible to apply for BSc programme at BN Patel Institute of Paramedical and Science. BSc is a four-year course offered by the institute. The four-year programme includes one-year internship.

courses_data.name: BN Patel Institute of Paramedical & Science PG Diploma Admission 2025
courses_data.description: BN Patel Institute offers a one-year PG Diploma course in affiliation with Sardar Patel University. The course is approved by the Faculty of Medicine and is offered inHospital Management, Medical Lab Technology andRenal Dialysis Technology. Admission to PG Diploma courses is based on the merit of the aspirants in the last qualifying exam. Candidates must complete graduation to apply for the course.

faqs.question: What are the PG Diploma courses offered at BN Patel Institute of Paramedical and Science?
faqs.answer: BN Patel Institute of Paramedical and Science offers a one-year PG Diploma programme. Candidates who have completed their graduation are eligible to apply for the course. Below are the PG Diploma courses offered by the institute:Hospital ManagementMedical Lab TechnologyRenal Dialysis Technology

faqs.question: What is the eligibility for PG Diploma at BN Patel Institute of Paramedical and Science?
faqs.answer: Candidates who have completed BSc inChemistry, Microbiology,Biotechnology, Biochemistry, Clinical Laboratory Technology, Home Science or Nursing; Bachelor of Physiotherapy; BHMS or BAMS can apply for BN Patel Institute of Paramedical and Science PG Diploma course. Aspirants must hold the documents proving their eligibility for verification at the time of admission.

faqs.question: What are the courses offered at BN Patel Institute of Paramedical and Science?
faqs.answer: BN Patel Institute of Paramedical & Science offers courses at UG, PG, Diploma and certificate levels. The institute offers a four-year BSc programme at UG and a two-year MSc at the PG levels. The institute also offers PG Diploma programme of one-year in various specialisations. Admission to all the courses is merit-based.

faqs.question: What is the minimum qualification required to apply at BN Patel Institute of Paramedical and Science?
faqs.answer: BN Patel Institute of Paramedical and Science specifies the minimum qualification required to apply for a course. The basic eligibility for UG courses is Class 12. Aspirants seeking admission in PG programmes must have passed graduation. Below is course-wise eligibility for BN Patel Institute:CourseCommon EligibilityBScClass 12 Science - Group A, B or AB; Gujarati or English MediumMScGraduationBOPTMClass 12 Science - Group A, B or AB; Gujarati or English MediumPG DiplomaBSc in relevant subjectsCertificateClass 10 or Class 12

faqs.question: Can I get admission at BN Patel Institute of Paramedical and Science without entrance exam?
faqs.answer: Candidates can get admission at BN Patel Institute of Paramedical and Science without any entrance exam scores. Candidates are offered seats in the institute based on their merit in the last qualifying exam. Aspirants having any relevant entrance exam scores can also apply provided they fulfil the eligibility requirements.

faqs.question: How can I get admission at BN Patel Institute of Paramedical and Science?
faqs.answer: BN Patel Institute of Paramedical and Science admission to courses is based on merit of the aspirants in the last qualifying exam. The institute evaluates the application form of the aspirants for verification. The institute considers the scores of the candidates in Class 12 for UG courses and graduation for PG programmes. Once selected, aspirants must pay the course fee to confirm their seats.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Information Technology - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Overall, the college is good but average.

review_content.Placements: Managers, IT employees, and lab assistants get roles depending on our skills and capabilities, so the roles are relevant. Basic roles are provided. But some students are selected in TCS, Infosys, and HCL, and many of them settle in other states and countries.
review_content.Infrastructure: I think it is good compared to government colleges. The hostel is okay, but the food is the worst. The students and friends are very good and calm-minded, and you have to open up with them. Some students can be threatening, but you should not get involved in any type of fight.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor in Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: It is the best college to learn and go.

review_content.Placements: The lowest package is 3 LPA, and the highest is 10 LPA. The top companies are Infosys, Cognizant, and Wipro. Sona Art's motto is graduation with placement. I like the college and enjoy the environment.
review_content.Infrastructure: They have a clean and green campus with a peaceful atmosphere. They have compatible sports activities. They have educational and non-educational clubs. The canteen food is good sometimes. The canteen is spacious and has a cool vibe. There is a ground to play. They have CCTV cameras everywhere. They have a safe hostel with an ambience of a home away from home. It is a ragging-free campus. It has an active entrepreneur development cell.

overview_faqs.question: Is Periyar University good for MBA?
overview_faqs.answer: Periyar University offers MBA course for a duration of two years. MBA (General) course is approved by AICTE. Apart from MBA (General) course, the university also offers MBA in Export Management. According to media reports, a total of 20 students of the Energy Science and Technology Department received a package of INR 3.6 LPA during Periyar University placements 2023. Apart from this, according to Periyar University NIRF report 2023, the median package offered during Periyar University PG 2-year placements 2022 stood at INR 3 LPA, respectively.Also, Periyar University Salem offers scholarships to PG students under the Free Education Scholarship scheme and various other scholarships are also offered via Government Scholarship schemes.

review_summary.college_name: Periyar University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: M.A. in English - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: It is accessed with various resources, but it is not very satisfying.

content.Placements: Companies hire students for the BPO customer service associate role rather than roles like content specialists, teaching, etc. These companies offer the medium packages, starting with 2.9 LPA, which is not enough even as a fresher. Companies like Aon, Antal International, and PlanetSpark participate in placements.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are enabled with online learning tools for the active participation of students. Libraries are accessed with various digital and offline journals and books. It is also accessed with DELNET. The transport services are provided by them around areas of the district.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Guidance for MBA discipline in placements scored the least.

content.Placements: BlackRock, Morgan Stanley, Accenture, and IBM were a few of the recruiters for the disciplines of MBA based on discussions by various placement offices there, and I rated 3.5 stars for placement coaching, which varied for disciplines, but for MBA it scored the least.
content.Infrastructure: The college was exclusively built for women students and supported them with lower-fee structures, others were encouraged to join the college considering the safety measures insisted for women. The transport system was enabled with all safety measures and even fitted with GPS tracking.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Information Technology - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Overall, the college is good but average.

content.Placements: Managers, IT employees, and lab assistants get roles depending on our skills and capabilities, so the roles are relevant. Basic roles are provided. But some students are selected in TCS, Infosys, and HCL, and many of them settle in other states and countries.
content.Infrastructure: I think it is good compared to government colleges. The hostel is okay, but the food is the worst. The students and friends are very good and calm-minded, and you have to open up with them. Some students can be threatening, but you should not get involved in any type of fight.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor in Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: It is the best college to learn and go.

content.Placements: The lowest package is 3 LPA, and the highest is 10 LPA. The top companies are Infosys, Cognizant, and Wipro. Sona Art's motto is graduation with placement. I like the college and enjoy the environment.
content.Infrastructure: They have a clean and green campus with a peaceful atmosphere. They have compatible sports activities. They have educational and non-educational clubs. The canteen food is good sometimes. The canteen is spacious and has a cool vibe. There is a ground to play. They have CCTV cameras everywhere. They have a safe hostel with an ambience of a home away from home. It is a ragging-free campus. It has an active entrepreneur development cell.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering (AI and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: I am very satisfied, because the highest salary package is provided.

content.Placements: In my course, 95% of students are placed. 29LPA is the highest salary package offered, 6LPA is the average salary package offered, and 3.8LPA is the lowest salary package offered. TCS, Accenture, Wipro, Infosys, Tech Mahindra, Colan Tech, Zoho, Dxc Technology, its all top recruiting companies, 90% of students got internship, mostly fresher roles are offered.
content.Infrastructure: More than 100000 books are currently in my college library. In every single classroom, having a separate projector is very useful for easy learning. The hostel food is very hygienic. Weekly thrice non veg is provided. The college bus is free for all day scholars.

admission_overview.college_name: Periyar University Course Admissions 2025: Fees, Eligibility, Dates & Selection Process

admission_overview.title: Periyar University Admission Overview 2025
admission_overview.description: Periyar University offers degree, diploma, and certificate courses to candidates at UG, PG and PhD levels. Courses offered are in the streams of Humanities & Social Sciences, IT & Software, Accounting & Commerce, Science, Business & Management Studies, Education, and Mass Communication & Media. Admission to the courses at Periyar University is merit or entrance-based, depending upon the applied course. It may be noted that the university also offers different UG and PG courses to candidates in distance education mode along with online courses. These courses are offered through the Periyar University Centre for Online and Distance Education (PUCODE).

eligibility_selection.title: Periyar University Eligibility & Selection 2025
eligibility_selection.description: Periyar University conducts entrance exams to provide admission to candidates in a majority of UG and PG courses offered by it. The entrance test and admission process are carried out by the respective department of the university. Candidates seeking admission shall first check the eligibility conditions for the course before applying. Check below the eligibility, fee and selection criteria for the Periyar University course admissions 2025: Courses

paragraphs: All admissions to Periyar University are entrance-based and merit-based. Most UG, PG and doctoral courses have their own entrance exams. Some also accept state/national-level entrance scores. You can follow the steps below:

Periyar University Application Process 2025Applicants must go to the official site and complete the application form online. The documents required should be uploaded, and the application fee must be paid using the given payment gateway. The filled form should be printed out and saved to be referred to later.
Selection RoundsFor MBA, applicants are considered on the basis of TANCET, MAT, CAT or the Department of Management Studies exam and then GD and PI.

The final seat assignment will be done after the candidates pay thePeriyar University admission feeand verify their documents.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for MBA at Periyar University?
faqs.answer: For admission to the Periyar University MBA course, candidates are required to fulfil the basic qualification requirements for this course. Those who are willing to get admission to the PG level MBA (General) course at Periyar University must get a UG degree of three years of duration with minimum of 50% aggregate in any stream. There is a relaxation of 5% given to candidates belonging to reserved categories. These candidates are required to pass a UG degree with minimum aggregate of 45%. Furthe

faqs.question: What MBA programmes are offered by Periyar University?
faqs.answer: Periyar University provides a two-year full-time MBA programme via its Department of Management. The general MBA and an MBA in Export Management are provided by the university. The programmes are offered at the PG extension centre in Dharmapuri. Industry-relevant learning through AICTE accreditation is ensured by Periyar University.

faqs.question: What is the admission process for MBA at Periyar University?
faqs.answer: Admission into MBA in Periyar University is done based on entrance test marks and selection rounds. They should clear TANCET, MAT, CAT, or Periyar University entrance exam. Selected candidates are then further evaluated based on Group Discussions and Personal Interviews. Periyar University makes the final admission into MBA based on overall performance.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for MBA at Periyar University?
faqs.answer: Periyar University asks the candidates to have a minimum bachelor's degree of three years duration. Students should have at least an aggregate of 50%, while reserved category students require 45%. In addition to the eligibility, candidates have to appear for the standardized entrance examinations. Periyar University makes sure that only suitable candidates are admitted to its MBA programme.

faqs.question: What is the admission process for Periyar University?
faqs.answer: The Periyar University admissions are based on applicants' merit, entrance exam score, academic records, fulfilment of eligibility criteria, and seat intake. Candidates are required to meet the course-specific minimum eligibility conditions and the selection criteria as well. Depending upon the applied course, further rounds of admissions are carried out. More details related to the Periyar University admission process are provided below:STEP 1: Periyar University Application Process 2025Candidates must fill an online application form with all the relevant details along with paying an application fee and submit the form at the Head Office of Periyar University.STEP 2: Periyar University Entrance ExamThere are different schools and departments in the university through which the courses are offered. Each department conducts an entrance test for UG/PG course admission. Candidates seeking admission have to appear for the test and score good marks to be eligible to take admission.STEP 3: S

faqs.question: Is there any entrance exam for admission to Periyar University BSc course?
faqs.answer: No, Periyar University does not accept scores for any entrance exam. There is no entrance exam required for Periyar University BSc admission. The university offers direct admission to all BSc courses. Students can only pursue BSc at Periyar University's affiliated colleges. The selection criteria is common across all the affiliated colleges. For admission to BSc courses, candidates must fulfil the minimum eligibility criteria in the first place. Direct admission is offered to such candidates. The university selects candidates based on their merit obtained in Class 12.

Periyar University has been recognised for its excellence in various fields by NIRF 2025, outperforming other institutes in parameters such as Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity & Research, as well as fostering an exceptional learning environment. In the 'Overall' category, the institute's ranks have descended when compared with the previous year's ranking. It is to be noted that the institute has demonstrated a fluctuating trend in the 'University' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, Periyar University fell 38 ranks to #94 rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking.
It has been observed that the institute has shown a decreasing trend in the 'State Public University' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, Periyar University fell 15 ranks to #40 rank in the 'State Public University' category by the NIRF ranking.

sports.description: With equal emphasis on physical education and sports, the university has a dedicated sports department or complex. The university has a huge space for outdoor activities such as football, cricket, kho-kho, basketball courts (2000 sqm), badminton, etc. The university regularly organises the All India South Zone Level Kabaddi, Volleyball, Football, Basketball, and Handball tournaments. Activities available to students encompass indoor sports such as chess, table tennis, Ludo, yoga and many other worthwhile recreational choices. Besides, it also has a separate gymnasium with professional gym equipment.

admission_overview.college_name: Presidency University Admission 2025: Application, Dates, Eligibility, Process

paragraphs: Presidency University admission 2025 is currently ongoing on the official website of the university. The university offers various courses, such as BSc, MSc, BA and many others. To get admission, candidates are required to meet the eligibility criteria set by the university. Candidates get entrance-based admission to all UG, PG and PhD courses.Presidency Universitycarries out the application process in online mode. faqs.question: How to get admission in Presidency University Kolkata?

The University offers UG, PG and PhD courses. Candidates can follow the table below to know the course-wise eligibility from the table below:CourseCommon EligibilityBScClass 12 with 70% to 80% aggregateMScGraduation with 55% to 60% aggregateMAGraduation with 50% aggregateBAClass 12 with 60% to 65% aggregatePhDMaster degree withat least 55% aggregate or equivalent.

faqs.question: Does Presidency University, Kolkata accept PUBDET score?
faqs.answer: Candidates interested to appear in PUBDET exam are required to check the eligibility criteria for the exam mentioned below. Check out the academic qualification below:Candidates should have cleared higher secondary examination Class 12 that is conducted by CBSE, West Bengal or equivalent exam, not before 2020.The candidate must pass Class 12 with at least five recognised subjects, including English language and excluding Environmental Science. The aggregate is to be calculated in the best four recognised subjects.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission in Presidency University Kolkata for BA?
faqs.answer: No, in order to get admission for BA at Presidency University, Kolkata the student have to pass PUBDET entrance exam. Candidates can choose the exam centre the nearest to them. However, candidates are advised that once the application form is submitted, the candidate can not change their exam centre so be careful.The allocation of the PUBDET exam centres was based on the choices gave by the candidate during the online form fill up. However, the centre mentioned will be final and no changes will be made. No request for change of allocated centre will be entertained under normal circumstances.

highlights.description: Presidency University, Kolkata is one of the most popular institutes of the country. Most of the ranking bodies have recognised this institute as one of the popular choices among students. The institute has been ranked #151-200 by the NIRF 2025 under the category University, and #51-100 under State Public University. The institute has been ranked well by eminent ranking bodies because of its curriculum, infrastructure and well-qualified faculty. Students can check the article in this space for more details around the Presidency University, Kolkata rankings.

nirf.description:
Over the years, Presidency University, Kolkata has earned commendable rankings across different domains in the NIRF 2025. This signifies the institution's esteemed reputation and proficiency in various aspects, assigning it an overall good score. It can be seen that the Presidency University, Kolkata's rankings in 'University' category have displayed a fluctuating trend as per the ranks of the previous years. In 2025, Presidency University, Kolkata fell 50 ranks to #151 rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking.
The rankings of the institute in the 'State Public University' category have displayed a stable trend when evaluated against previous year's rankings. In 2025, Presidency University, Kolkata's rank is #51, the same as last year's rank in the 'State Public University' category by the NIRF ranking.
Explore the Presidency University, Kolkata latest rankings by other ranking bodies and their categories below:

qs_world.description:
According to the rankings from QS World University Rankings, Presidency University, Kolkata outperformed various other institutes, securing a higher position for its achievements in Teaching, Graduation Success Rates, Research, and creating an inclusive, quality learning environment. Presidency University, Kolkata's rankings in 'Asia' category have shown a fluctuating trend as per the rankings of the previous years. In 2026, Presidency University, Kolkata fell 71 ranks to #522 rank in the 'Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings.
The ranks granted to the institute in the 'Southern Asia' category have shown a fluctuating trend when compared to last year's rankings. In 2026, Presidency University, Kolkata fell 13 ranks to #137 rank in the 'Southern Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings.

hostel.description: The university provides hostel accommodation for both boys and girls. The hostel boys named as The Government Eden Hindu hostel with accommodation of 274 students including UG and PG both. The girl's hostel comprises 91 students including UG and PG both. The hostel has its own well-stocked library and its recreation center.  Students participate actively in sports such as football, cricket, volleyball, and table tennis.
facilities: Candidate’s credentials will be verified at the counselling centre.
Aspirants need to appear in-person at their counselling centre.
Credentials of candidates eligible for counselling and admission will be verified on stipulated dates, which will notified to the candidates.
The Presidency University quota will be applicable for candidates who have qualified their BA/BSc (honors) degree through regukar examination of the university as per merit.
Admission through non-PU quota will be based on the rank secured in PUBDET 2024 entrance exam.

library.description: The library has a very unique and rich collection of books, periodicals, and manuscripts as well as multimedia resources built over nearly two hundred years. This includes some of the rarest reference materials along with thousands of important documents and journals. The library comprises two main units - i.e., - the Arts Library, the Science library alongside the individual departmental libraries. With the vast stock of old and rare books as well as the growing maintenance demands, plans for further infrastructural development and expansion are underway.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty and lab facilities are very good. Placement is not so good (average).
reviews.review_text: The life sciences department has huge lab facilities. Students can do hands-on practicals. The hostel has bus facilities. Food quality and the room are okay. Classes have a blackboard and projectors. The life sciences department has its own sample collection.

reviews.review_heading: We get excellence in knowledge, cultural aspirations, faculty members, and courses.
reviews.review_text: Our university has two libraries (arts and central) where innumerable books, articles, magazines, daily newspapers, and study materials are available to enrich students with a wider spectrum of knowledge. Classrooms for my course carry historical significance, where many eminent Indian personalities did higher studies. The AC room in our department is short in number. It will be better if rooms get modernised with centralized AC and are a bit cleaned regularly. Wi-Fi is not good. Canteen food is...

reviews.review_heading: Presidency College, Kolkata
reviews.review_text: The technical team is available in the laboratories at all times to assist the students with the precise usage of equipment. Libraries are well stocked with basic books required for subject references for all disciplines in multiple copies. The possibilities of conducting fests are at the maximum rate.

reviews.review_heading: The faculty members try hard to give us proper and better education to secure our future.
reviews.review_text: Our department provides good infrastructure such as big classrooms with gallery system seating arrangements, AC in summer, a projector, and big screens. Feels like a movie theatre. I don't stay in a hostel, but I share now reviews like they provide a beautiful meal in a week, they arrange a transport system from the hostel to the campuses.

reviews.review_heading: A well-rounded college experience - Faculty, infrastructure, and beyond.
reviews.review_text: University has libraries where the students get access to a wide range of books, reference materials, daily newspapers, magazines, and so on. Campus is well-maintained and the classrooms are also equipped to hold a good number of students. University has hostel facilities for the students. Canteen food here is quite affordable. Campus has a gym area and a sports room to foster the physical skills of the students.

reviews.review_heading: Very satisfied with the course.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is pretty good, according to me. Labs are well-equipped, and experiments are performed using the right apparatus. Classrooms have the facilities of light, a fan, and air conditioning. There is a central library, and perhaps any book needed can be found there. Hostel facilities are decent with proper electricity and water. Food available in the mess and canteen can be relied upon, and hygiene is maintained. Medical facilities are also available when needed. Much importance is g...

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely recommend this one.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is extremely beautiful, but it is only for boys. There is no girls' hostel facility. Hygiene is maintained, and the environment is friendly among all types of students. There is no ragging at the extreme level seen in other colleges. Students are free to talk to their juniors.

reviews.review_heading: The exact place you need to grow as an artist as well as a human being.
reviews.review_text: We have our lecture theatre with two portable ACs, sound systems, and a projector for a comfortable and engaging learning experience for the students. We have our practical room at the Black Box Theatre, and all the instruments are available there guitar, tabla, keyboard, etc. We have our dance studio where the dance students as well as the theatre students practice their arts and the library contains all the necessary books for the course. The hostel is big, there's a huge football ground, the ...

reviews.review_heading: Presidency College and its shenanigans with the prospect of academics and placements.
reviews.review_text: The art department is considered to be one of the best in the country. The infrastructure consists of labs, Wi-Fi, AC, classrooms, etc. The hostel is a Hindu hostel which is available for all the students of the university.

reviews.review_heading: Goodness of Presidency University.
reviews.review_text: The facility of my department is good. The library of our college is amazing. There is every kind of book which we need. As I have not applied for a hostel so don't know much information about the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Best for local and nearby students.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is maintained well with the best facilities according to the fees. No Wi-Fi is available on the campus. It has a big library, classrooms, seminar hall, labs, boys and girls common room. No hostel facility is provided by the college. Canteen food is great and hygienic in taste.

reviews.review_heading: Good faculty, really good infrastructure, best campus life.
reviews.review_text: The Department of Mathematics is one of the best departments in the University, both from the academic and infrastructural side. We have a central AC system. There are 3 new generation computer labs. There are two smart lecture theatres for various seminars and classes. Each batch has separate classrooms. High-speed Wi-Fi is provided throughout the campus. There is a separate seminar library in the department with all necessary books and materials. Other than that, there is a Central Library of ...

reviews.review_heading: One of the most prestigious colleges in Kolkata, Presidency University, College Street.
reviews.review_text: Presidency University, Kolkata has really good infrastructure. They provide hostel facilities for both boys and girls. They have free Wi-Fi facilities. The classrooms are really big, and they have 2 libraries, one in the main building and another in the central library.

reviews.review_heading: The essence of the three P's of Presidency University is positivity, pace, and patience.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good with proper seminar halls, classrooms, a library, and 4 big buildings. The food and medical facilities are good. It has a good basketball court and a big green field. Our canteen serves proper healthy food. There are aquitards on every floor and corridor to drink water.

reviews.review_heading: One of the best colleges in Kolkata, West Bengal. Fantastic faculty infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Its infrastructure is really good. Students, teachers, staff, and scholars all have their own different Wi-Fi networks everywhere. There are libraries for each department, but the central library is massive, with 5 floors in total and thousands of books, including old historical books. New newspapers and magazines come daily, like the Times of India, The Hindu, Yojana, and Kurukshetra. The whole campus has central AC. We have 3 to 4 canteens. The food is delicious, and the price is low, too. We ...

highlights.summary: Magadh Institute of Pharmacy, is located in Patna, Bihar. It is an institute approved by PCI. Magadh Institute of Pharmacy provides 2 UG courses in several specialisations. Theses programmes are offered in Full Time mode. B.Pharma and D.Pharma are some of the courses offered at Magadh Institute of Pharmacy. Some of the stream in which these courses are offered include Medicine & Health Sciences. The total fee at Magadh Institute of Pharmacy ranges between INR 1,60,000 to 3,20,000. Magadh Institute of Pharmacy has a student intake of 160 for all the courses. Magadh Institute of Pharmacy offers all the infrastructural facilities to students.

The NEET MDS 2026 application process has commenced for Rajasthan Dental College and Hospital admission to the MDS course, with Mar 30, 2026, being the last date to register. Also, the NEET MDS exam 2026 is going to be held on May 2, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

faqs.answer: A:    Rajasthan Dental College and Hospital is a well-known institution for MDS, BDS courses, and these programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. Rajasthan Dental College and Hospital has course specializations in Prosthodontics, Periodontology, Orthodontics , Oral Medicine & Radiology, Oral and Maxillofacial Surgery, Oral Pathology , Public Health.
faqs.question: What all specializations are provided by the courses offered at Rajasthan Dental College and Hospital?

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: I'm completely satisfied with our college teachers, hostel and hospital as they are excellent.

review_content.Placements: Students take admission in our college through NEET exam, and after completing the degree, we get jobs easily in dental hospitals. Even we can start our own clinics. If we opt for jobs in other hospitals, we can easily get the starting salary of Rs. 30,000 per month. We can easily get jobs in any clinics, and we can also opt to pursue further PG degree.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college is well constructed and established, and there are air-conditioners and proper furniture. In our hostel rooms, the mess provides delicious food, but it is not same as the homemade food. However, it is good. There are attached bathrooms in our hostel rooms. In the hospital, 9 departments of dentistry are well maintained with brilliant faculty members. Our college organises sports week and cultural weeks every year. Playgrounds are available on the campus, and there is also a gym facility.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: I am fully satisfied with this college.

review_content.Placements: In our college, students get admission through NEET exam. We can do a job in hospitals and can get a starting salary ranges from Rs. 40,000-50,000 per month. We can also start our personal dental clinics somewhere else. The best part is that after completing the course, we can get a job easily in any dental hospital.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is well-maintained and constructed. Our college provides facilities like Wi-Fi connectivity, well-equipped labs and air-conditioned classroom. The hostel has all the relevant facilities for students like well-furnished rooms with attached bathrooms. Quality of food served in the mess and canteen is good.

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: The college infrastructure and placements are good.

content.Placements: Nearly 72% of students get placed every year in our college. The highest salary package offered is 18 LPA, while the lowest salary package is 4.5 LPA. The average salary package is 9 LPA. The top recruiting hospitals are Clove Dental and FMS Dental Hospitals, with the top roles being dentist and clinical practice. About 60% of students secured internships.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very good. The whole campus is Wi-Fi enabled, and there is a lab for every subject. Our department has separate blocks for the BDS course, and many technical and financial books are available in the library. The hostel facilities are decent, providing 24-hour service, and the food served in the hostel is satisfactory. The canteen food is tasty.

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Rajasthan dental college and hospital - insight .

content.Placements: There is nothing such as placement after BDS. You have to start a clinical practice or study for the NEET MS exam. After the internship, one can apply for jobs as a Junior Resident or Fellowship around the country. Alternatively, you could look to pursue an MBA in Hospital Management.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities given by the college are moderate. Classrooms are clean but have no AC, so it is a little bit hard to survive in summer. Hostels are well maintained, having air conditioning and other facilities too. There is a general hospital within the campus with a medical shop and cafeteria, along with a mess. A library is available with an ample amount of books regarding the course. In sports, there is a gymnasium and a volleyball court, along with cricket nets on the campus.

reviews.review_heading: The college infrastructure and placements are good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good. The whole campus is Wi-Fi enabled, and there is a lab for every subject. Our department has separate blocks for the BDS course, and many technical and financial books are available in the library. The hostel facilities are decent, providing 24-hour service, and the food served in the hostel is satisfactory. The canteen food is tasty.

reviews.review_heading: Rajasthan dental college and hospital - insight .
reviews.review_text: Facilities given by the college are moderate. Classrooms are clean but have no AC, so it is a little bit hard to survive in summer. Hostels are well maintained, having air conditioning and other facilities too. There is a general hospital within the campus with a medical shop and cafeteria, along with a mess. A library is available with an ample amount of books regarding the course. In sports, there is a gymnasium and a volleyball court, along with cricket nets on the campus.

reviews.review_heading: I'm completely satisfied with our college teachers, hostel and hospital as they are excellent.
reviews.review_text: Our college is well constructed and established, and there are air-conditioners and proper furniture. In our hostel rooms, the mess provides delicious food, but it is not same as the homemade food. However, it is good. There are attached bathrooms in our hostel rooms. In the hospital, 9 departments of dentistry are well maintained with brilliant faculty members. Our college organises sports week and cultural weeks every year. Playgrounds are available on the campus, and there is also a gym facil...

reviews.review_heading: I am fully satisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is well-maintained and constructed. Our college provides facilities like Wi-Fi connectivity, well-equipped labs and air-conditioned classroom. The hostel has all the relevant facilities for students like well-furnished rooms with attached bathrooms. Quality of food served in the mess and canteen is good.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of good faculty.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good. Wi- Fi facility is not available in the college. The library is good. Sports and games aren't that good. However they conduct sports activities during sports events. The food offered in the canteen is okay, but the quality of the food offered in the mess is poor.

reviews.review_heading: Very affordable and good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available for our course were good. Wi-Fi facility was present in the college. Well-furnished modern labs were available. A central library was also available for study. The hostel was decent, and sports and games facilities were also available.

highlights.summary:
The NEET UG 2026 registration window is now closed for admission to the MBBS, BDS, and other courses. The exam is scheduled for May 3, 2026.

Here are some additional updates regarding the Government Vellore Medical College:

faqs.answer: A:    Government Vellore Medical College has received an impressive review rating of 5 on Placements based on 1 feedback of verified Shiksha students.
faqs.question: Does Government Vellore Medical College provide good placement facilities?

fees_and_eligibility.overview: At the UG and PG levels, Government Vellore Medical College offers a diverse range of progammes. Candidates can choose Full Time courses, from streams like Medicine & Health Sciences and Nursing. College offers MBBS and UG Diploma courses at the UG level. While, at the PG level, the college offers available programmes like MD, MS and M.Ch. The Government Vellore Medical College course fee ranges between INR 61,245 to 90,000.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: It is a good place to get wide clinical knowledge and academics with no ragging.

review_content.Placements: Lots of students after completing MBBS in GVMC, joined postgraduate courses in many other colleges, and some joined the same GVMC. It depended upon each one's preparation for NEET PG, but more than 80 percent of our college got postgraduate admissions, some in multispecialty fields.
review_content.Infrastructure: There was a single building for boys with 3 floors, and each floor had around 20 rooms. There were workers who cleaned floors and bathrooms every day. The hostel mess was maintained by the student council. The food taste in boys hostel was so good, and postgraduate teachers and working members also dined there. The same fits to girls hostel, but the hostel mess food was the same. There were 4 classrooms, 3 of which could accommodate 150 students, and the last one could up to 250 students.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: It is a great learning experience with good faculty members and infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: We are 101 students and presently doing our Final year. We get one of the extraordinary training by best faculty members, and after completion of this final year, we have to do an internship for one year with payment. After that, we can practice medicine on our own.
review_content.Infrastructure: Hostel facilities are provided for both boys and girls separately. There are adequate spacing and privacy in the hostel with good space for studies and also games. Food is also good, and the hostel fees charged is also feasible and also provides good care.

description: What’s new at Medanta Institute of Education and Research cut off 2022? The MCC has released the final result of NEET SS 2021 Counselling for Special Mop-Up Round 2 on July 29 for admission to Medanta Medical College DM/ MCh courses. Click here to download the results. Selected candidates must report to allotted colleges from July 30 to August 3.
Tabulated below Medanta Institute of Education and Research cut off 2022 dates:

MedantaÂ InstituteÂ of Education andÂ Research NEET SS cutoff 2025 is out for Round 1. The NBEMS has released the NEET SS cutoff for admission to Super Speciality courses, such as DM, DNB and MCh etc. The cutoff is available for different categories under the AI quota. For the General category students under the AI quota, the NEET SS 2025 cutoff ranged between 21 and 4643, with DNB being the highly sought-after course for admission.

MedantaÂ InstituteÂ of Education andÂ Research DNB cutoff 2025 ranged between 21 and 4643 for the General category under the AI quota. With a lowest cutoff rank of 21, DNB in Endovascular And interventional Radiology turned out to be the most competitive specialisation for admission.
Students not eligible for this specialisation can also consider DNB in Gynaecologic Oncology with a lenient first-round cutoff rank of for admission.

individual_reviews.title: Glimpse of Katihar Medical College

content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of Katihar medical college and hospital is good. It has a lush green 55-acre campus in Katihar. There is a college canteen available, and also hostel facilities are provided by the college separately for girls and boys and UG and PG.

individual_reviews.title: Satisfied by quality education.

answer.text: Vedantaa Institute of Medical Sciences offers Degree courses including 1 UG and 17 PG courses. These programs are offerred in Full Time mode. Vedantaa Institute of Medical Sciences has specializations such as MD specializations in Microbiology, Dermatology, General Medicine, Psychiatry, Community Medicine, Anatomy, Anesthesiology, MS specializations in Ophthalmology, Obstetrics & Gynecology, General Surgery, Orthopaedics.

review_summary.college_name: Vedantaa Institute of Medical Sciences Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Vedanta Medical College: Quite a good college and has improved a lot in these years.

content.Placements: We don't get placement in the college as it is a medical college. But we do get internships in this college after the completion of our course, which is 4.5 years. In this internship, we are provided with a good amount of stipend, and we get to learn all the medical skills.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is quite good. We are provided with the best library with ACs installed, where we can go and study from morning till 1 a.m. at night. The hostel that we are provided serves its purpose and is sufficient for us. It is cleaned from time to time and is affordable.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Actually I am satisfied with my college.

content.Placements: Our college is good. Our exams are semester-wise. Also, there are practices in various hospitals, which makes us feel so good and gives us a lot of experience, which is essentially the percentage with a good score that can get admission here. Also, management seats are there.
content.Infrastructure: The labs and practical rooms are so good. Also, they feel like to live made here. The messy food is also so. Good and best and healthy as well. The canteen in our campus and hostel campus both are so good and tasty food available. Our college has good Wi-Fi access for all.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Review of my medical College.

content.Placements: Good curriculum Intake capacity of college is 150 There is no seats alloted for reserved category candidates. Course offered till now is only MBBS Allotment is via NEET-UG There might be more courses in future like Physiotherapy, Nursing and PG medical .
content.Infrastructure: Twin sharing basis hostel with Wi-Fi equipped though it does not works most of the Times. Library with an outside reading room facility. Though not sufficient for every student Mess is okay types. No any cafes or restaurants near by. Just a small tapri.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: It has a good infrastructure, campus, and is the best place to study medicine.

content.Placements: Students can join anywhere as medical officers or can join hospitals after getting a degree. It depends on your choice, what you prefer. Or can also go for post-graduate learning after graduation. There are many options open after doing your MBBS degree, like a medical officer, and tutor.
content.Infrastructure: Everything related to infrastructure is very good. The campus is well-planned and constructed. The library is also very good and big enough to accommodate many students at a time. Classrooms and libraries are supported with an audio-visual system. we have air-conditioned classrooms and a library.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with its faculty members.

content.Placements: This college is under the control of MUHS. Hence, MBBS course is granted by the government of India i.e NTA. Students who pass out from this college can easily practice anywhere in India. As this college is established in 2017 so final year batch will complete their course this year only.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities are good, and the infrastructure is under construction. Wi-Fi is provided by this college and hostel management. Laboratories are good. Classrooms are also good, and library is good and study friendly. Hotel facilities are best in this college. They provide all daily activities such as cleaning, etc.

admission_process.title: Vedantaa Institute of Medical Sciences Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Vedantaa Institute of Medical Sciences admissions are based on merit. The institute considers applications of candidates meeting the eligibility criteria.Vedantaa Institute of Medical Sciencesoffers courses at UG and PG levels. Some of the courses include MBBS, MD and MS. Candidates can apply online for the preferred course.
The total tuition fees for UG courses isINR 63,69,548. Aspirants may also need to pay one-time caution deposit at the time of admission.
The institute offers UG courses for 66 months. PG courses are offered for 3 years.
